Big spread of blackberries cover this area and also behind the Txdot property. One of the few spots that they can grow unchecked! Thinking about planting some other species in the area, maybe some mulberry or pecan trees.... Access: Public. Falling Fruit seaso

Lots of goldenrod plants grow along the interstate here (and everywhere else, I'm sure). Wonderful medicinal plant, it's very good for colds and upset stomaches. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
